name: Bifold Wallet Build
description: Complete workflow for constructing a classic bifold wallet from veg-tan leather. Beginner-friendly, no machinery required.
steps: Cut card pocket panels (9cm × 8cm each, 4 panels for 2 pockets).
Bevel all edges with an edge beveler.
Mark stitch lines with a wing divider (4mm from edge).
Punch stitch holes with a stitching chisel.
Saddle stitch card pockets to main body.
Apply conditioner (neatsfoot oil or leather balm).
